name: Banana Shortcake
recipeIngredient: 1 9x5-inch baked angel food, sponge or pound cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the cake lengthwise into two layers. Place one layer on a serving platter.
2. In a large bowl, stir together the whipped cream and sugar until well combined.
3. Spread some of the whipped cream generously over the first cake layer.
4. Peel and slice the bananas horizontally. Arrange them in a single layer over the cream.
5. Spread more cream over the bananas to cover them completely.
6. Top with the second cake layer.
7. Frost the top and sides of the cake with the remaining whipped cream.
8. To serve, arrange sliced bananas over the top of the cake.
9. Slice the cake crosswise into 6 pieces. Place each piece cut side down on a plate.
10. Top each piece with banana sauce and hot fudge sauce.
